text: Growth can highlight other people's inaction. If you've been on top of your game, working out, taking care of yourself, but your friend is just not. They're not going to the gym, they're not putting in the work, and they know. We all know when we should be doing something, but we're not. And they see you doing that. So, it reminds them of how little they're doing and how much more they should be doing. And they don't like that you are a reminder of that.
